data.title: Crypto prices 1/16: BTC near $98k; altcoins expect buy interest at support levels amid market rally pause.
data.description: The recent surge in the cryptocurrency market came to a halt as Bitcoin encountered resistance around the $98,000 mark. Despite this setback, analysis of technical charts indicates that traders are likely to purchase altcoins and Bitcoin at lower prices near key support levels.

data.title: BMZ, Novo Nordisk Foundation, Rockefeller Foundation, and WFP aim to feed 100M children by 2030 in Africa, Asia, and Latin America. US$80M secured for School Meals Accelerator.
data.description: Focusing on alleviating hunger and poverty while enhancing food and nutrition security in Africa, Asia, and Latin America, a program aims to maximize the impact of national school feeding initiatives. This effort has been kickstarted with a substantial funding of US$80 million contributed by the four founding partners, along with France and the Global Partnership for...

data.title: Russell 2000 hits 11th straight record high, outperforms S&P 500 for 11 days. U.S. economy grew at 5.3% in Q4. Tariff pressures low.
data.description: The Russell 2000 index achieved a record high for the eleventh consecutive session, outperforming the S&P 500 for 11 days – the longest streak since 2008. Investors, anticipating strong US economic growth, shifted towards small and mid-cap companies for potential earnings surprises. Industrial production increased by 0.4%, surpassing expectations; retail sales indicated resilient consumer spending, and initial jobless claims eased labor market concerns. Tariff pressures were contained, and the Atlanta Fed's GDPNow model predicted a 5.3% expansion in Q4. Large-cap indices remained flat while the Russell 2000 increased by 0.5% during midday trading. The focus shifted to electricity-related stocks, exemplifying the bullish market sentiment.

data.title: Bluerock Private Real Estate Fund (BPRE) to pay $0.1117 per share monthly distribution on January 30, 2026.
data.description: New York, January 16, 2026 - Bluerock Private Real Estate Fund (NYSE: BPRE) will be issuing its inaugural monthly distribution to shareholders following its recent listing on the NYSE. The distribution, scheduled for January 30, 2026, will amount to $0.1117 per share for investors who are recorded as shareholders as of January 16.

data.title: Stellar (XLM) SCF 7.0 improves grant system with AI screening, refs rewards for developers.
data.description: The latest iteration of the Stellar (XLM) Community Fund, Version 7.0, has been released. This update brings several notable features including AI-powered prescreening, verified referral incentives, and accelerated funding tracks specifically designed for Web3 developers within the network. This development aims to enhance the funding process and support developers more efficiently. These enhancements are expected to streamline the process for applicants, providing them with quicker responses and verified referral rewards. This initiative reflects the commitment to innovation and support for developers within the Stellar community, ensuring that they have the necessary resources to thrive.

data.title: VeChain VET, Rekord, and AMRC collaborate on EU Digital Product Passport system, handling over 100K events per month.
data.description: VeChain, Rekord, and Sheffield's AMRC have collaborated to introduce a production-scale DPP infrastructure in anticipation of EU mandates. The system is capable of handling over 100,000 events per month. For further details, click on the link provided.

data.title: Bitcoin drops but shows promising bullish signal; potential for recovery rally soon, as analysts expect. #BTC #cryptocurrency #signals
data.description: Today, the price of Bitcoin is facing a decline, yet on the positive side, BTC has recently displayed its most prominent bullish signal. This development has caught the attention of numerous investors and analysts, raising hopes of a potential recovery rally in the near future.

data.title: Muhammad Ibrahim takes office as IICA Director General, vows to enhance agriculture cooperation in the Americas with support from 30+ countries.
data.description: In an event held in San Jose, Costa Rica on January 16, 2026, Muhammad Ibrahim officially took on the role of Director General at the Inter-American Institute for Cooperation on Agriculture (IICA). The inauguration ceremony was attended by key figures from over thirty nations, including ministers and senior officials.

data.title: Celonis aids Fujitsu in enhancing inventory management and enabling AI-driven transformation globally.
data.description: In Tokyo, Munich, and New York, Celonis has revealed that its platform is driving business innovation at Fujitsu and other companies worldwide.

data.title: Seela launches new AI creative platform Jan 16, 2026. Features text-to-image, image-to-image, and multi-model AI chatbot comparison.
data.description: On January 16, 2026, in Los Angeles, Seela introduced a new comprehensive AI-driven creative platform. This platform combines text-to-image, image-to-image, and multi-model AI chatbot comparison tools in one user-friendly interface. This integrated workspace allows users to efficiently explore, analyze, and produce content with improved precision.
